# Code of Conduct

This project should be a practical, respectful space for building and reviewing
an independent Zig implementation of the Codex CLI.

## Expected Behavior

- Be direct and technical without personal attacks.
- Keep discussion focused on reproducible behavior, design tradeoffs, and
  concrete evidence.
- Respect privacy. Do not post tokens, auth files, private prompts, local
  session transcripts, or sensitive paths.
- Credit upstream behavior and source material clearly when discussing parity.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, threats, discriminatory language, or sustained personal attacks.
- Publishing another person's private information.
- Posting credentials, secrets, or exploit details in public issues or pull
  requests.
- Misrepresenting this project as affiliated with or endorsed by OpenAI.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may edit, hide, or remove comments and issues that violate these
expectations. Serious or repeated violations may result in blocked
participation.

Report conduct concerns privately to the repository owner when possible. For
security-sensitive reports, follow `SECURITY.md` instead of opening a detailed
public issue.
